intro: Ernesta bracteata, also known as Ernestella bracteata, is a plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function.
